Clients.desc:
Download and install the client for your operating system.
As most of the clients are signed, you can use and install the certificates first.

Certs.desc:
To limit the risk, the software is signed with certificates from LSC-Labs.
Install the root and the intermediate certificates from first - be sure you are installing it from the correct page.

desc: The easiest way to install the software is to use the one click deploy feature (MS).
You will stay up to date and get the software immediately.
Microsoft uses an executable file, with the name "setup.exe".
From security point of view, this is not a good idea, but it is the easiest way
to install the software and keep it up to date.

click.title: One click deploy
html: Microsoft uses an executable file, with the name "setup.exe".
From security point of view, this is not a good idea,
but it is the easiest way to install the software and keep it up to date.

port.title: Portable Version
html: Download the software (zip package) and choose a folder to unpack the software (i.E. C:\Apps\OnAirNotifier).
As it is a portable version, you can start the software from any location (also from a USB stick)
Be aware, that you have also a security risk, so ensure you are on the right download page!

fw.title: Framework Version
html: The framework version can be used, if you aren't able to install the .net runtime in lack of admin rights.
